coverage_note: The bundled SIRT6 population database emphasizes longevity cohorts and rare centenarian alleles instead of a full general-population allele-frequency reference panel.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from SIRT6 longevity, genome-stability, and metabolic-aging literature.

gene_population_patterns.summary: Common SIRT6 longevity signals such as rs350846 are cohort dependent and are best interpreted as probabilistic aging markers rather than universally penetrant alleles.

The most compelling current SIRT6 human-genetics result is a rare centenarian-enriched functional allele, underscoring that the locus is shaped by both common regulatory and rare mechanistic variation.
